home.subtitle: Sana is a cybersecurity awareness platform that finds vulnerabilities in your digital literacy.

protection.title: How Sana Protects You
protection.subtitle: A comprehensive toolkit designed to test, train, and fortify your digital habits against modern social engineering tactics.

item1.title: Simulated Phishing Environments
item1.description: Experience hyper-realistic clones of popular Kazakh banking and service portals to test your awareness safely.

item2.title: Device Vulnerability Checks
item2.description: Interactive lessons on securing your smartphone, 2FA setup, and identifying malicious apps masquerading as useful tools.

visual.title: Real-Time Threat Analysis
visual.description: Our AI system continuously monitors and analyzes emerging scam tactics globally, instantly adapting our simulations to protect you against tomorrow's threats today.

simulation.title: Practice
simulation.hubSubtitle: Challenge yourself with community-created scenarios, an AI-generated test, or a random pick to see how well you recognize modern threats.
simulation.learningTracksSubtitle: Pick a topic and run a focused short practice session.
simulation.questionsLimitHint: You can submit up to 20 questions in one test.
simulation.noCommunityScenarios: No community scenarios available yet. Be the first to create one!
simulation.reviewNotice: Your scenario will be reviewed by an AI moderator. Make sure one choice is clearly the correct action.
simulation.choicesLabel: Choices (Top should be correct, bottom two incorrect)
simulation.aiError: The AI model could not generate a new scenario right now. Please try again later.
simulation.alwaysVigilant: Always stay vigilant. Cybercriminals constantly evolve their tactics.
simulation.realSituationConsequence: In a real situation, this choice could lead to financial loss, identity theft, or emotional harm.
simulation.factFallbackNote: If AI is busy, Sana will instantly use verified database facts.
simulation.learningCoachExcellent: Excellent work. You handled all scenarios safely.

auth.loginSubtitle: Secure access to your Sana account

articles.subtitle: Expand your cybersecurity knowledge with short, impactful articles.
articles.learningSubtitle: Open a module, review key signals, and launch topic-focused practice.
articles.createDesc: Share your cybersecurity knowledge with the community.
articles.practicePrompt: Launch a focused simulation based on this article and earn points.

art1.title: How to Spot a Phishing Email
art1.desc: Learn the core markers of malicious emails and how they trick you.
art1.p1: Check the sender domain carefully: tiny letter swaps often reveal fakes.
art1.p2: Urgency and account-lock threats are common pressure tactics.
art1.p3: Never enter credentials from email links; open the official site manually.

art2.title: The Power of 2FA
art2.desc: Secure your accounts with Two-Factor Authentication.
art2.p1: Prefer authenticator apps over SMS when possible.
art2.p2: Store backup 2FA recovery codes in a secure offline location.
art2.p3: Enable 2FA on email first because it protects account recovery paths.

art3.title: Public Wi-Fi Risks
art3.desc: Why you should never check your bank account at a cafe.
art3.p1: Avoid banking and email login on open Wi-Fi unless you use VPN.
art3.p2: Verify network names with staff to avoid evil-twin hotspots.
art3.p3: Disable auto-join Wi-Fi on phone and laptop.

art4.title: Social Engineering Basics
art4.desc: Hackers exploit human psychology. Here is what to look out for.
art4.p1: If someone asks for sensitive info under urgency, pause and verify.
art4.p2: Confirm identity through an independent communication channel.
art4.p3: Never approve codes or payments you did not initiate yourself.
